ab: Ira ci mamo i loma’ haw?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Iraay, mafoti’ay cingra i kafoti’an.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: Ira ci mamo i loma’ haw?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Awaay, masadakay to cingra ihoni, dadaya to nga minokayay.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: Ira ci akong i loma’ haw?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: Ira cingra i sakatosa a tingroh, kilimen iso cingra i kafekang.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: Ira ko tamdaw i loma’ haw?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Ci Kacaw! halafin to caka araw kiso, nga’ayay kiso haw? ?
ch: B:是Kacaw!很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?(※Kacaw改為各族男生名)
en: It’s Kacaw. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: Fangcal to! kilimen ako kiso a malaholol.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: Icowaay ci mama^ iso?
en: Where is your father?

ab: Ira cingra i kofaw a misafel, atien ako cingra.
ch: B:他在廚房煮菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: Talacowaay ci Panay saw?
ch: A:Panay去哪裡了?(※Panay改為各族女生名)
en: Where did Panay go?

ab: Tayra cingra i pakoko’an a micapet to koko’.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: Akong, tayniay to kami.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: Awaay ci akong namo i loma’, i omahay cingra, i loma’ a mitala kamo cingraan.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: Faki tayni to kiso!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: Halafin to caka saso’araw kita, ’akawangay to kiso.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: Mahemek a ma’araw kiso a tayni.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: O hano namo koni a talacay, telien i pingsiyang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: Halafin caka tayni, atien ako cangra a malacafay kita a mitaheka.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫他們一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: Aka to malifotaw , o ociya ko nanomen ako nga’ay to, i palafangan kita a malaholol.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: Aray to pisitay no miso, minokay to kako.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: I sawniay ho a pacoken koni a koko’, panokayen o hakakaenen no miso.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去吃吧。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
